title: Basis Sets: Expanding the Wavefunction
description: Master the concept of basis sets in quantum chemistry—how we represent molecular orbitals as linear combinations of atomic-like functions and the trade-offs between accuracy and computational cost.
learningObjectives: Explain why basis sets are necessary in quantum chemistry
Distinguish between different types of basis functions (STO, GTO)
Understand basis set notation and hierarchy
Choose appropriate basis sets for different calculations
Connect basis sets to quantum computing resource requirements
